name: hooked-ux
description: Design habit-forming product loops using the Hook Model (Trigger, Action, Variable Reward, Investment). Use when the user mentions "users arent coming back", "engagement loops", "habit formation", "push notifications", "variable rewards", "daily active users", "habit zone", "user retention loops", "build a habit", "increase engagement", or "how do I get users to return".
